# [ChangLog](https://github.com/ziyuefan/EventAlertModAll/blob/main/README.md#changlog "ChangLog")
zh-TW_to_en.0667670d243d7574a16a8f44844bce9d:
# [ScreenShot](https://github.com/ziyuefan/EventAlertModAll/blob/main/README.md#screenshot-2 "ScreenShot")

##Command line

## The following instructions are case-insensitive:

**/eam SCDRemoveWhenCooldown**

*Switch completion command, the skill cooling icon will be removed after cooling down (true means to remove; false means not to remove)*

**/eam SCDNocombatStillKeep**

*Switch type command, whether the skill cooling icon will still be displayed after leaving combat (true will remain displayed; false will not be displayed after leaving combat)*

**/eam SCDGlowWhenUsable**
zh-TW_to_en.4c4f426cf5e2cff17b3bf903adfd9110:
*Switch type command, whether the skill cooldown is highlighted when available (true means highlighted when available, false otherwise)
This instruction specifically states that it uses IsUsableSpell() to determine if the instruction is due to resources or
If there is a debuff that prevents it from being cast but its skill conditions cannot be met, it will not be highlighted and the distance is not limited*

**/eam MiniMap [Reset]**

*Switch type command, used to display whether the setting gear is displayed or not, plus reset the forced positioning to the lower left corner of the minimap*
zh-TW_to_en.c890950f790fb7c27de9f3e1758dc285:
**/eam UpdateInterval n**

*Set the update frequency. The smaller it is, the faster it is. If you are unable to get tired in a team battle, please increase this value. The default is 0.1S (0.1 ~ 1 second)*

**/eam IconAppenSpellTip**

*Whether switch-shaped commands and icons are displayed when the mouse is moved away*

**/eam ShowRunesBar**

*Switch type command, used to decide whether to display the death knight rune column (new in 2020/10/18)*

**/eam StackFontSize nSize**

*Command to change the upper data size (case-insensitive, you can also use /eam sfs nSize instead)*

**/eam TimerFontSize nSize**
zh-TW_to_en.4b0403cbb8237e3725c24fdc0c2c6f13:
* To change the number size (not case sensitive, you can also use /eam tfs nSize instead)*

**/eam SNameFontSize nSize**

* To change the role name size (case-insensitive, you can also use /eam nfs nSize instead)*

# [ChangLog](https://github.com/ziyuefan/EventAlertModAll/blob/main/README.md#changlog "ChangLog")
# [CommandLine](https://github.com/ziyuefan/EventAlertModAll/blob/main/README.md#Command line"CommandLine")
zh-TW_to_en.07751e831f442a0e811fe8ee6dadc817:
--[Retail 12.1.0]2026.06.09
	-- Zero allocation and event-driven full module architecture reconstruction (complete data and view decoupling):
	   -- Completely reconstruct and decouple the five major data services AuraService, CooldownService, ItemCooldownService, GroundEffectService and TotemService.
	   -- The five major services have been completely changed to event-driven and are no longer directly coupled with the Renderer rendering engine. Instead, the `EAM_*_STATE_CHANGED` event is thrown to EventRouter.
zh-TW_to_en.9b7b75247fc1f0178956818e7fdd5e19:
--Introducing an exclusive zero-allocation state buffer pool (such as AuraStatePool, etc.) into the data service, binding releaseFunc when obtaining the state object, completely eliminating runtime GC memory garbage.
	--Introducing AlertManager intermediary controller and Scheduler throttling:
	   --Introduced AlertManager to uniformly manage and process five types of change events. After the icon is hidden, the state objects are recycled into their respective Pools.
zh-TW_to_en.5bb1f328ecadc40989a3613ddfc8f1c9:
-- Use Scheduler to implement asynchronous throttling and batch layout updates, effectively eliminating Layout Churn (typesetting jitter) and repeated calculations in high-frequency battles.
	-- Shadow Host technology implementation and UI privilege escalation avoidance:
	   -- Create a new ShadowHostService to perform transparency and level downgrade Hook on the official cooling manager (CDM) icon when out of combat.
zh-TW_to_en.bdafbe3f157a8fd110e9b89fdb4729d1:
-- Implement parasitic rendering and cascade layout avoidance, EAM icons are automatically mounted to the official Shadow Host, 100% avoiding the risk of Taint Chain contamination caused by layout arithmetic and SetPoint in combat.
	   -- Solve the problem of ClipsChildren clipping and Cooldown spiral black screen occlusion. In parasitic mode, the skill name is automatically placed at the bottom and the privilege is elevated FrameLevel + 10.
	   --Supports dynamic CDM Shadow Host enable/disable switch, providing complete setting panel buttons and multilingual entries.
zh-TW_to_en.33c9d16f4b4a53d2cfb9d371f9b3b45c:
-- 16 major new and high-frequency Warcraft event integrations:
	   -- Replace COMBAT_LOG_EVENT_UNFILTERED with UNIT_SPELLCAST_SUCCEEDED (CLEU) to capture non-Aura ground effects (e.g. orbs, blizzards).
	   -- Replace high-frequency energy updates with UNIT_POWER_FREQUENT events and overwrite them with COOLDOWN_VIEWER_SPELL_OVERRIDE_UPDATED event reaction talents.
	   -- Subscribe to SPELL_ACTIVATION_OVERLAY_GLOW_SHOW / HIDE native golden bright frame to synchronize EAM with the shortcut column Proc glow.
	-- Static JIT Compilation performance optimization and fault isolation:
zh-TW_to_en.3d6fdda4face4cc55ee95ba231f3b48f:
-- Completely removed the `pcall` predicate traversal in the OnUpdate core loop, and introduced the `timerTokenPool` zero allocation delay schedule to ensure that the hot path LuaJIT can be 100% compiled by Trace Compiler.
	   -- Configure parameterized isolation defense for EventRouter OnEvent distribution and Scheduler task callback, so that errors reported by a single sub-module will not affect the entire domain.
	--Automated packaging and publishing tool (Build-CurseForgePackage.ps1) security upgrade:
zh-TW_to_en.84d16e24597917805071b0d48feccafc:
-- Fixed the allowedExtensions missing `.blp` image file bug to ensure that custom UI buttons and texture resources are not missing.
	   -- Optimize regular matching of sensitive information to prevent misjudgment. The EAM code is written to defend against World of Warcraft Secrecy restrictions.
	   -- Use @() to force Get-Content to be an array type and fix the System.Char Trim crash bug caused by single-line files.

--[Retail 12.0.7]2026.06.06
	-- Specialization and occupation name dynamics API Localization reconstruction:
zh-TW_to_en.c83cf5c5628363d8c65699b4cee36f10:
-- Use GetSpecializationInfoForClassID API to dynamically obtain the official localized specialization text of the current language client.
	   -- Create a CLASS_TOKEN_TO_ID comparison table to support dynamic name loading of all 13 professions and specializations, remove the hard coding of specialization names, and provide dual-track fallback.
	-- Cleaning of hard-coded strings in the entire project and completing dictionaries of five major language families:
	   -- Extract ClassPowerService, GroundEffectService, ItemCooldownService default prefix and fallback names.
zh-TW_to_en.18bbc8e2bfb4b5dd38d49a95f3c4bffe:
-- Extract Options setting interface checkbox/slider, alignment and growth direction drop-down options, Slash console command instructions and print prompts.
	   --Complete 144 entries of zhTW (Taiwan Traditional Chinese), zhCN (Simplified Chinese), enUS (English bottom level), koKR (Korean) and ruRU (Russian).
	-- ClassPower Core resource security and debugging enhancements:
	   -- Deploy pcall isolation and issecretvalue defense for detectClassPower and updatePower.
zh-TW_to_en.2e28e53e7635739f4926a988d2a69334:
-- Prevent Fatal Error crash caused by size comparison when energy value mutates to Secret Table during battle.
	-- EventRouter/Scheduler Fault isolation:
	   -- Add parameterized pcall fault isolation for OnEvent loop and Scheduler timed task callback.
	   -- Ensure that when a single module is abnormal or reports an error, it will not cause other modules to crash or interrupt scheduled cleanup.

--[Retail 12.0.7]2026.05.30
zh-TW_to_en.b65ea00eb48315f4c944a7f00421ba6b:
--Reconstruct the ground effect monitoring (GroundEffectService.lua) to implement the Tooltip Scraping mechanism in five major client language families and multiple languages:
	   -- Supports enUS/enGB, zhTW, zhCN, koKR, ruRU.
	   -- Use numerically-indexed arrays with Util.tableFreeze to lock the regex matching pattern, eliminating the GC and CPU consumption of Lua string hashing and table lookup.
	   -- Automatically identify the `GetLocale()` language, and seamlessly downgrade to English if the match fails, or retain the manually set default safety time.
zh-TW_to_en.508795b2d8d18f43f7f5e40786d2718c:
-- Added multi-module alarm framework (Multi-Frame) architecture, completely splitting 7 independent alarm frames!
	-- Supports own Aura (selfAura), target Aura (targetAura), skill cooldown (spellCooldown), item cooldown (itemCooldown), professional energy (classPower), ground effect (groundEffect), and totem frame.
zh-TW_to_en.df72a8b80487a7caf15e990631e222dd:
-- Each frame has a completely independent X/Y coordinate, and simultaneously displays the corresponding translucent label positioning background in the "Mobile Reminder Frame" mode, supporting independent mouse dragging and position storage.
	-- Implement continuous numeric index layout optimization policy for ultimate performance (use table.freeze to lock the LAYOUT_OFFSETS direction offset static array), use a single arithmetic multiplication to replace multiple If-Else conditional branches, and eliminate string hash search and CPU collision overhead!
zh-TW_to_en.b59cfb9f9b587dd5d78c0719ddb9d773:
-- Added "No Halo Ground Skill Monitoring" service (GroundEffectService.lua) [NEW]:
	   -- Monitoring SPELL_CAST_SUCCESS, supports "Tooltip dynamic analysis" and "manual time setting & one-click capture and filling" dual-track timing mode.
	   -- Read once at the moment of casting, no longer polling Tooltip in OnUpdate, 100% avoid CPU loss, and use Scheduler for centralized delayed expiration release.
zh-TW_to_en.8e7d52f51a171e31e4d70dfc3693ee38:
-- Added "Totem Monitoring" service (TotemService.lua) [NEW]: Call 12.x native C_Totems.GetTotemInfo to directly read totems such as shamans, arrange them closely in real time and follow the growth direction vector.
	-- Added "Professional Special Energy Monitoring" service (ClassPowerService.lua) [NEW]: Dynamically presents core energy (holy energy, combo points, fragments, infuriating energy, arcane charging, etc.) according to occupation, using Classic Icon + central large-scale digital font display, and automatically hides when it returns to 0.
zh-TW_to_en.823ddfb000ffe832d7bb8fca2578a49e:

zh-TW_to_en.05bb92ae582873e2d922212b74d5cc1d:
-- To support the duration of skills without Aura, please enter the "Skill Spell ID" in the prompt module of this profession.
   The program will automatically capture the duration in the skill prompt. If it cannot be captured, please check and modify localization.tw.lua.
   Regular expression of EA_XCMD_SPELL_DURATION_PATTERN1, EA_XCMD_SPELL_DURATION_PATTERN2
   
   For example, Blizzard (190356), Mirror Image (55342), Ball of Frost (84714), Rune of Power (116011), etc.
   P.S. 116011 is the duration of the rune, and 116014 is the BUFF that will only appear within the effective range of the rune.

zh-TW_to_en.04250db06c7180e9ecf0f807502fff0d:
However, if it is triggered by specific conditions and has a built-in CD, the player needs to manually enter a fixed value. Currently, the more inconvenient method is to use the input format of the spell ID.
   Enter the cooling seconds separated by a semicolon (;). For example
   Cypher's secret is just enter 208052;30
   Absorption Shield Necklace 207452;30
   If it does not work immediately after input, please /rl or /reload to reload the UI.

The legacy decompression return phase content layer is not retained unless there are clear, strict, and documented Retail server security fallbacks.

## Pollution Control Policy
The Warcraft Wiki's safe execution/taint document states that AddOn and `/script` are untrusted sources; once taint enters the protected/secure path, Blizzard UI actions may be starved during combat. EAM Avoiding polluting modifications must be considered an architectural boundary, not just a bug.

Implementation rules:
zh-TW_to_en.3a18753a81925a7f6b315ef187a7bb1b:
- EventRouter uses orphan frames; the frames are rendered for display only and do not assume safe operation or protected interaction.
- When UIPalent frames are required, limit them to unprotected display purposes; if `InCombatLockdown()` is true, defer structural UI changes.
- No use of `forceinsecure`, no attempts to bypass contamination, and no workarounds to suppress Blizzard blocking actions.
- When contamination, blocked actions, or combat lock errors are discovered, they need to be logged to `Docs/15_DEVELOPMENT_ISSUE_LOG.md`.
zh-TW_to_en.4697fbe9b2b67ff8cf08e5e65aa1ff87:
- Aura facts must come from securely structured Retail server Aura data, anchored by stable `NeverSecret` `AuraInstanceID`.
- **Block Halo Integration**: For unwanted or junk/useless Halos, utilize native "C_UnitAuras.AddBlockedAura(unit, auraInstanceID)" to delegate filtering to the C++ engine. This method (`AllowedWhenUntainted`) must only be called if the plugin's execution path is completely untainted.
zh-TW_to_en.09c15c5e582d0d1182a06a301156a56d:
- If a value is secret/protected/display-only, mark `boundaryLimited` and do not force it to pass normal Lua comparison or table key logic.
- Don't keep the extensive legacy UnitAura unpacking mapping as architecture.

#Implementation and pollution control review report: Unify OnUpdate and version offset

> [!NOTE]
> This document was written by EAM Performance & Taint Control Expert to evaluate the unified (legacyTimer) compatibility timeout in the EventAlertMod refactored version, the arithmetic allocation performance of the LAYOUT_OFFSETS static offset array, and to identify potential implicit garbage allocation issues in combat.

---

## 1. Unify OnUpdate timer (legacyTimer) effective header review
zh-TW_to_en.1f85d4ebe973660c4b270e2aaea3828f:
* **Single frame centralized driver**: Avoid the high-cost design of binding `OnUpdate` to each icon or each perfume. When no task is started, `legacyTimerFrame:SetScript("OnUpdate", nil)` will be called to unbind and maintain zero CPU usage.
* **Orphan framework isolation**: `legacyTimerFrame` is a parentless framework (`CreateFrame("Frame")`), completely decoupled from the `UIParent` core chain, eliminating the risk of contamination propagation during event dispatch.
### 1.2 Runnable overhead and GC bottleneck analysis
zh-TW_to_en.babe64409c9aacfe1fc4013a7b6fc359:
* **RISK**: The official `CooldownViewer` and ActionButton belong to a highly protected security/protected framework. The non-safe EAM icon is attached to the safe frame by calling `SetParent` during combat. When Blizzard UI attempts to rearrange the layout or the safe frame, it will operate its subsystem to contain the unsafe frame, causing the entire chain execution to be marked as contaminated, which in turn causes a fatal error in which the operation button is flooded and cannot be clicked.
### 3.2 Implicit GC heap garbage allocation
zh-TW_to_en.c7bae5b8d7525a09600b9b74cd1147c9:
This report reviews [Docs/21_RACI_EXPERTS_MATRIX.md](file:///d:/EventAlertMod/Docs/21_RACI_EXPERTS_MATRIX.md) specifications, which are handled by **performance and pollution control expert** (Responsible), who provide core technical decision-making consultation to **main agent**.
* **In the next reconstruction cycle, partial reconstruction should be carried out immediately for `UI/Renderer.lua` and `UI/IconPool.lua` to implement "time string storage", "direct call without pcall" and "CreateFrame delay defense in combat" to ensure the highest low-defense when AddOnMCO is compatible", which is absolutely compatible

# AI prompt export structure

## Purpose

Mainly for debugging and exporting. It exists to aid users or artificial intelligence agents in checking
EAM status, which consumes a large amount of log dumps.

Model:

- `debug-min`: Compact structure and fast support.
- `analysis-full`: Detailed but limited status for architectural /debug analysis.
- `github-issue`: User-readable problem payload.

## Need to separate

Exports must be separated:
zh-TW_to_en.ea9662c64776c33fc720c90a3ad51823:
- `Secret_Values`, `ScriptObject_DurationObject`, `C_Spell.GetSpellCooldown`, `C_TooltipInfo.GetUnitBuffByAuraInstanceID` These single-page archives have been demonstrated to support the architectural decisions of EAM: the source layer must handle secret boundaries and the renderer should try to migrate Blizzard gadget display durations.
- Public API change summary for 12.0.7 currently shows no direct impact EAM Aura/cooldown/item Large API changes to Cooldown core logic, but new __EAM__CODE_4__6, EA DurationObject/timers show tracking matters.
zh-TW_to_en.fdf008b8226877b916a56c6c6675813f:
- Debug keys: `debugstack` and `debuglocals` If the current function or calls a key value that has been touched before, the key value may be returned. EAM Debug export must not set stack/local to safe text for direct output.
- ScrollBox secret: Officially correct the problem caused when secret appears in the scroll box area. If EAM makes a setting list in the future, it still needs to avoid putting the secret/protected original value into the scrollable UI.
zh-TW_to_en.f97878890fa64fbcd980f330ddc329b2:
12.0.5 Specify string format API no longer applies field width modifiers to secret strings, e.g. `"%.5s"` does not break secret strings.

EAM Rules:

- Do not rely on severance of secretly derived text.
- `C_TooltipInfo` still checks whether the text is secret before parsing.
- Debug export not to hard-export the secret string through `format`.
-timer/name The length control of text should be done on the safe string.

### Player statistics associated with Aura Secret

Conclusion:

- EAM in 12.x does not use CLEU as the primary source for the Aura /cooldown.
- Only refer to it when necessary when debugging or checking non-hot paths.
- No WeakAura-like combat parser built.

### Escape sequences/hyperlinks

`UI escape strings` and `Hyperlinks` are risk areas for debugging text, tooltips, and importing /export.

Three important layers:
zh-TW_to_en.ff12710e1118cf91dfb08e0cf5431fda:
- The annotation needs to explain "why this file exists", not just "what this file does".
- Annotate the data to be recorded, the variable state, and the module boundaries that cannot be crossed.
- Restrictions on hot paths, Secret Values, Protected Data, SavedVariables, and UI framework change-related files must be clearly written.
- Comments should be kept concise and maintainable; do not write long declarations that are out of touch with the plan.

### LibQTip

EAM Multi-column tooltips are not required. Debug export to output compact text, no need for complex tooltip framework.

### LibRangeCheck / LibGroupInSpecT
These libraries have additional querying, checking, or caching behavior. EAM core is not a raid helper and does not require a group spec/range engine.

zh-TW_to_en.26167b02954bc51c95b2abbd006aa727:
1. When the player casts a skill, obtains a Buff, or performs a backpack cooling item test, there is no alarm frame or chart on the screen, but the debugging diagnosis in the Slash command can be successfully called.
  2. Item cooldowns lack a separate category in the options UI (the 5th red button receives special attention, and items have no obvious eye access).
- Reason determination:
zh-TW_to_en.bc69ec82bd080fad02279ab1685e5c87:
- Symptoms: The old fallback makes it easy to scan the same unit repeatedly when `UNIT_AURA` is fully updated or the target changes; the options are still stubs and cannot provide a setting entry visible to general users.
- Cause judgment: Aura complete update is a hot path candidate. If the number of alarms is scanned repeatedly, the more cost gain the user sets; if the option does not change `SavedVariables` to API, it is easy to bypass the architecture revision and service refresh.
zh-TW_to_en.0ab6dd84701f576ce7db0b0b98edf7be:
- Effective solution: For complex searches within the project, use `rg -n 'pattern' path` first; if you must use script variables in `powershell -Command`, you need to write the `` `$variable``，或改用 `.ps1` tool.
- Follow-up notes: After repeated occurrences, they can be organized into "EAM Windows Static Check" project skills to avoid being referenced every time for jewelry token troubleshooting.

# Retail server AddOn research and EventAlertMod optimization route

This document compiles the research results discussed on 2026-05-26 on the Warcraft Wiki, Blizzard Forum, WoWInterface, CurseForge and Reddit AddOn, and plans the optimization matters and goals for the rewrite of the EventAlertMod Retail server.

This document is not an actual machine verification report. All Retail 12.x behavior still requires loading tests in the WoW Retail / PTR client.

## Investigate sources
zh-TW_to_en.ae4c3e81829c6741f1034bbdf11b8ab0:
- Defer any layout changes that may affect the frame structure while under combat lock.
## Priority P1: Stabilization of core functions

- Player Halo: Firstly, it supports the safe and absolutely safe self-buff/debuff; when it is unsafe, the icon/name or protected timer is displayed.
- Target Aura: Only track `target`, avoid target target/focus target/nameplate extension.
- Spell cooldown: Uses `C_Spell` structured return; takes precedence over `DurationObject`; supports `ignoreGCD`.
zh-TW_to_en.6e44f41779651c7725555af955ae7fb5:
2. Completed the first version of P1/P2: SavedVariables add/remove API, Slash add/remove, AuraService `UNIT_AURA` snapshot addition aware cache, debugging and debugging.
3. The second half of P2 has been completed: AuraService fully updates the unit system in a single scan, with the minimum option to add/remove panel.
4. P3 has actual measurement results: The user confirmed on the 12.0.7 PTR client that the `C_DurationUtil.CreateDurationTextBinding` minimum sample can be displayed normally.
zh-TW_to_en.4ff0c14d84a54745d747c5be6d79d39f:
* **Restrictions**: This event does not contain formatted data such as `spellID`, `sourceGUID`, `destGUID`, etc., only plain text and colors. The CPU used for regular expression inference has load capacity and does not have version robustness.
    * **Application**: EAM registers it to `EventRouter` as a debug/trace log. When the user turns on the debug mode, it is directly output as an extraordinary combat event stream, without involving the core Aura/cooldown timing facts.

---
### 📌Activity 2: `COMBAT_TEXT_UPDATE`
zh-TW_to_en.a1e7b24c91e8b15893cd8f8e73d4e8c0:
*Mainly used for `EventRouter` debugging and tracking monitoring. When `AuraService` suddenly fails due to security restrictions, it can be used as a defensive auxiliary log to obtain the `"SPELL_AURA_START"` status.

---

### 📌Activity 3: `UNIT_SPELLCAST_SENT`
* **Preliminary effect**: Triggered when the monitored unit sends a spell casting request to the server (it takes effect at this time and has not actually been successfully cast, at this time the GCD judgment or the beginning of the spell).
* **Argument payload**:
zh-TW_to_en.da443f4ea8d4935c7b8cabbc1fc719ac:
* **Initial effect**: Triggered when the spell's availability (Usable) status changes (such as the energy value is sufficient/casting, or the skill casting conditions are met/cancelled).
* **Argument payload**: No arguments.
* **EAM Integration Strategy**:
* Can be used as an opportunity for `CooldownService` auxiliary detection. In debugging mode, record this sending event to help troubleshoot the bug that some cooldown skills are not displayed as available after CD transfer due to insufficient resources.

---

zh-TW_to_en.a796a1c76eb599136323ac5dde924bb5:
- Provide old data migration, default, and verification.
- Don't freeze SavedVariables.
- Does not read every frame or high runtime state.
- Fields that cannot be safely migrated must be backed up or marked as genetic, and user settings must not be silently destroyed.

## Debugging/AI handover rules

- Debugging is turned off by default.
- Debugging Debugging must be achieved.
- Snapshot needs to be split:
  - Facts
  - derived
  ——Human Notes
  - boundaryWarnings
  - environment
- No huge log output.
zh-TW_to_en.fdb77dfce0d26c651b0850f55b14af0c:
4. Static verification: perform available Lua syntax check, global variable search, `C_Timer.After` closure search, `table.freeze` error search.
5. Report: Clarify changes, unverified matters, risks and next steps.
## Quick instructions

- When the user only enters the word "resource", `Tools/Build-CurseForgePackage.ps1` is executed directly.
- When the user enters "compressed development version", `Tools/Build-CurseForgePackage.ps1 -DevMode` is executed directly.
zh-TW_to_en.ea64bb34228ad1d9018c046ead1c5aa9:
- Pay close attention to the `pcall` isolation and `issecretvalue` defense mechanisms for `detectClassPower` and `updatePower` deployments to prevent Lua crashes caused by size comparisons when the energy value difference is a secret table in combat.
* **EventRouter/Scheduler Fault isolation**:
- Parameterized `pcall` fault tolerance for the OnEvent core loop of `Core/EventRouter.lua` and the scheduled task callback of `Core/Scheduler.lua` to ensure that when a single module reports an error, it will not interfere with or interrupt the execution of other modules and timing.
